summary: Iteration 19 testing complete. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: WhatsApp button correctly positioned (desktop: flush left x=0, vertical text; mobile: bottom-left pill at y=663), hidden on /admin and /portal routes. Admin login working with correct credentials. All 10 sidebar navigation items functional. WhatsApp Connect view shows session status, QR pair flow, send message form, message history table. Conversations view shows list with channels/status/count, detail view with reply input and channel selector. KI-Agenten view shows 4 agents (Research, Outreach, Offer, Support) with ACTIVE status, orchestrator badge showing openai/gpt-5.2, task input with customer email field, execute buttons per agent.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Iteration19_Message sent via WhatsApp API, TEST_Iteration19_Fact added to customer memory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified all new features: (1) WhatsApp button CSS - desktop: flush left (x=0), vertical text bottom-to-top, rounded right edge; mobile: horizontal pill at bottom:140px left:12px; hidden on /admin and /portal via body.hide-wa class, (2) WhatsApp Connect Admin view - session status display, QR pair button, disconnect/reconnect/simulate-connect/reset buttons, send message form when connected, message history table with direction/contact/content/time columns, (3) Conversations view - list with channels/status/message_count, click to open detail, reply input with channel selector (Chat/WhatsApp/Email/Admin), (4) KI-Agenten view - 4 agent cards (Research/Outreach/Offer/Support) with German descriptions and ACTIVE badges, orchestrator status showing openai/gpt-5.2, task input with optional customer email for memory injection, execute buttons per agent, (5) All sidebar navigation working: Dashboard, Commercial, Leads, Kommunikation, AI-Chats, WhatsApp, Timeline, Kalender, Kunden, KI-Agenten, (6) Backend APIs all working: WhatsApp endpoints (pair/status/reconnect/simulate-connect/send/disconnect/reset/messages), Agent endpoints (list/route/execute), Customer Memory endpoints (get/add facts), Conversation endpoints (list/detail/reply).

whatsapp_button_desktop.details: Flush left (x=0), vertical text, position:fixed, left:0px, writing-mode:vertical-rl, border-radius:10px 0 0 10px (compensated for 180deg rotation), href=https://wa.me/31613318856

whatsapp_button_mobile.details: Horizontal pill at bottom-left (x=12, y=663), border-radius:24px, writing-mode:horizontal-tb

whatsapp_button_hidden_admin.details: WhatsApp button not visible on /admin route (hidden via body.hide-wa CSS class)

whatsapp_button_hidden_portal.details: WhatsApp button not visible on /portal route (hidden via body.hide-wa CSS class)

admin_login.details: Login with p.courbois@icloud.com / NxAi#Secure2026! successful, JWT token returned

admin_sidebar_navigation.details: All 10 nav items working: Dashboard, Commercial, Leads, Kommunikation, AI-Chats, WhatsApp, Timeline, Kalender, Kunden, KI-Agenten

whatsapp_connect_view.details: Session status display, phone number, connected/last activity timestamps, QR pair/disconnect/reconnect/simulate-connect/reset buttons, send message form, message history table

conversations_view.details: List with contact/channels/status/message_count/last_activity, click to open detail, messages displayed with sender/channel/content/time, reply input with channel selector

ki_agenten_view.details: 4 agent cards (Research/Outreach/Offer/Support) with German descriptions and ACTIVE status, orchestrator badge showing openai/gpt-5.2, task input with customer email field, execute buttons per agent

whatsapp_api_endpoints.details: All endpoints working: GET /api/admin/whatsapp/status, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/pair, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/reconnect, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/simulate-connect, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/send, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/disconnect, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/reset, GET /api/admin/whatsapp/messages

agent_api_endpoints.details: All endpoints working: GET /api/admin/agents (lists 4 agents + orchestrator), POST /api/admin/agents/route, POST /api/admin/agents/{agent}/execute

customer_memory_api.details: GET /api/admin/customer-memory/{email} returns customer context, POST /api/admin/customer-memory/{email}/facts adds memory fact

mocked_apis.whatsapp_qr_pairing: WhatsApp QR connector is a bridge solution - simulate-connect endpoint simulates connection. QR code is a placeholder.
mocked_apis.agent_execution: Agent execution uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for actual LLM calls - not mocked
